scoring_rules.rule: Give 1 point when the learner improves specificity in the revised question.
Give 1 point when the learner improves context in the revised question.
Give 1 point when the learner improves purpose in the revised question.

growth_levels.description: Can notice that a question is too vague.
Can improve at least one missing element in a question.
Can produce a clear question with specificity, context, and purpose.

feedback_templates.message: Your question got stronger because it now names the exact topic.
Your question is clearer because it now explains the learning situation.
Your question is more useful because it says what kind of help you want.

result_message_rules.rule: Start by naming the strongest improvement in the revised question.
Show a simple score out of 3 based on the core criteria.
End with one actionable suggestion for the learner's next revision.
